assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section

outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 43-49 of claude-md-result.md: '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields present: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:', 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 52-55 of claude-md-result.md: '### Version Streams' section with table row '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 58-62 of claude-md-result.md: '### Source Repositories' section with table entries '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 3), '## Jira Configuration' (line 10), '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) with '### Limitations' (line 31), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 35)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 35-39 of claude-md-result.md: '## Bug Configuration' section with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 44-45 of discovery-log.md: '## Step 9 -- Security Configuration' and 'User was asked whether to enable security triage -- user accepted.' Lines 47-62 detail fields collected: Product Lifecycle fields (Step 9.1), Version Streams (Step 9.2), and Source Repositories (Step 9.3)

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5 of changes-log.md: 'All Project Configuration sections were newly added to CLAUDE.md.' Sections listed as NEW: '### 1. Repository Registry (NEW)' (line 9), '### 2. Jira Configuration (NEW)' (line 15), '### 3. Code Intelligence (NEW)' (line 24), '### 4. Bug Configuration (NEW)' (line 35), '### 5. Security Configuration (NEW)' (line 41)
